subcodes.title: Du’a’ li’n-Nuri’l-Asfar
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by that which is most exalted in Thy Divinity, though verily all Thy Divinity is supremely great in Thy sight and in the Mother Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاسئلنک من الوهیتک باعظمها او کل الوهیتک عظیمه عندک ثم فی ام الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
